description_long: This is a modern, full-sized urban coach bus with a streamlined yellow exterior and black roof accents. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows along both sides, separated by slim vertical pillars, providing ample visibility for passengers. Decorative graphics, including arrows and a map motif, are displayed on the lower side panels, adding a dynamic visual element. The front of the bus is equipped with a wide windshield, integrated headlights, and side mirrors, while the rear includes a large window and tail lights. The bus rides on six wheels, with two axles at the rear and one at the front, and has a roof-mounted air conditioning unit. Entry and exit are facilitated by a single wide passenger door located near the front on the right side.
description: A large, yellow urban coach bus with black roof accents, large side windows, and dynamic side graphics. It features a wide front windshield, a single passenger door, and roof-mounted equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, headlights, and side mirrors, with the roof-mounted unit visible.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full length of the bus, large tinted windows, side graphics, and the main passenger door near the front.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back window, tail lights, and the continuation of the roof-mounted unit.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the uninterrupted row of large windows and side graphics, with no visible passenger door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side, separated by slim vertical pillars, with a continuous row and no significant variation in size or shape.
